Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 121 

INTRNL_USE_SSI_IND_CD 

LABEL: MEDPAR Internal Use SSI Indicator Code 

DESCRIPTION: Internal use SSI Indicator code. 

SHORT NAME: SSICD 

LONG NAME: INTRNL_USE_SSI_IND_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: 1-9, B-X, a-z, #, @, > 
null/missing 

COMMENT: Limited availability; for internal use only; applicable to inpatient claims only. Where not available, this 
field
